tagline: Award-Winning Landscape Design for Estates, Gardens & Public Spaces

hero.badge_2: Serving Hudson Valley to the Hamptons
hero.headline:
Estate Landscapes That Take Your
Breath Away
hero.subheadline: Your property deserves more than ordinary landscaping. Hudson Berkshire brings award-winning design, international expertise, and 19 years of craftsmanship to every estate, garden, and pool landscape we create across New York and beyond.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Landscape Architecture That<br class="hidden md:block"> Elevates Every Property
services.subtitle: From sweeping country estates to intimate courtyard gardens, we design outdoor spaces that harmonize with your property's character and the natural landscape around it.

cards.title: Estate Landscape Design
cards.description: Comprehensive design for country estates, farms, and vineyards — creating sweeping outdoor environments that honor the land and elevate your property's full potential.

cards.title: Pool & Water Features
cards.description: Custom pool landscaping that integrates swimming pools naturally into your surrounding gardens, terraces, and terrain — creating seamless outdoor living retreats.

cards.title: Garden Design
cards.description: Curated garden environments with thoughtful plant palettes, seasonal interest, and layered textures that bring beauty and structure to any scale of outdoor space.

cards.title: Site Planning & Analysis
cards.description: Strategic assessment of terrain, drainage, views, and environmental factors to create optimal layouts that work with your land, not against it.

cards.title: Project Management
cards.description: End-to-end oversight of every landscape construction detail — coordinating contractors, materials, timelines, and budgets for flawless execution of your vision.

cards.title: Plans & Construction Docs
cards.description: Detailed landscape plans and professional drafting that translate design concepts into precise construction documents, ensuring accurate and beautiful results.

how_it_works.headline: Your Vision, Brought to Life in Three Steps

steps.title: Schedule a Site Visit
steps.description: We walk your property together, discuss your vision, and assess the landscape's unique character — terrain, light, views, and existing features. No pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: Receive Your Custom Design
steps.description: Our award-winning team creates a detailed landscape plan tailored to your property's architecture, environment, and your personal style — complete with construction-ready drawings.

steps.title: Watch It Come to Life
steps.description: We manage every detail of construction and planting, coordinating craftsmen and suppliers to deliver a landscape that exceeds your expectations — on time and on vision.

about.label: Why Clients Choose Hudson Berkshire
about.headline: Award-Winning Designers with an International Eye
about.description: Led by British designer Dan Milner — with a Masters in Landscape Architecture from Edinburgh and 19 years of practice across the UK, Europe, and the US — Hudson Berkshire brings a rare blend of international perspective and deep local knowledge. Together with Michele Wurm, a Cornell-educated, dual-state licensed landscape architect, we deliver designs that have earned recognition from the Royal Horticultural Society and the Landscape Institute.

features.title: International Design Expertise
features.description: Our team has designed landscapes across Edinburgh, London, New York, and the Hamptons — bringing world-class perspective to every property we touch.

features.title: Licensed in New York & Connecticut
features.description: Fully licensed landscape architects in both states, with chartered membership in the UK Landscape Institute since 1997.

features.title: Every Detail, Every Season
features.description: We design for year-round beauty — considering seasonal color, light patterns, and the long-term growth of every plant and material we specify.

pricing.headline: Transparent Design Fees. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project begins with a clear proposal. You'll know exactly what to expect — scope, timeline, and investment — before any work begins.

guarantee.headline: Our "Design Excellence" Promise
guarantee.description: If at any milestone you feel the design doesn't reflect your vision, we revisit and revise until it does — at no additional charge. We stand behind every plan, every planting, and every detail we deliver. Your satisfaction isn't a goal; it's our standard.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We work primarily across the Hudson Valley, the Hamptons, Connecticut, and New York City. We also take on select projects in Great Britain and Europe. If you're unsure whether your location is within our range, reach out — we're happy to discuss.

faqs.question: How long does a typical landscape project take?
faqs.answer: Design timelines vary by scope — a garden design might take 4-6 weeks, while a full estate landscape can span several months. We provide a detailed timeline during our initial consultation so you know what to expect from day one.

faqs.question: Do you handle pool design and landscaping together?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in integrating swimming pools seamlessly into the surrounding landscape. By designing the pool and gardens as one cohesive vision, we create outdoor spaces that feel natural and unified rather than pieced together.

faqs.question: What makes your firm different from other landscape designers?
faqs.answer: Our team combines award-winning international experience with deep knowledge of the Northeast's climate and terrain. Dan Milner brings a British design sensibility refined across the UK and Europe, while Michele Wurm adds Cornell-trained expertise and dual-state licensing. That combination is rare.

faqs.question: Do you manage the construction and installation?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer full project management, coordinating every contractor, supplier, and timeline detail so the finished landscape matches the design exactly. Many clients choose this option for a seamless, worry-free experience from concept to completion.

testimonials.name: Estate Owner
testimonials.text: Dan and his team transformed our country property into something truly extraordinary. Their understanding of the landscape and attention to every detail made the entire process seamless. The design perfectly balances formal elegance with the natural beauty of the Hudson Valley.

testimonials.name: Hampton Homeowner
testimonials.text: Working with Hudson Berkshire on our pool landscaping was an exceptional experience. They created an outdoor space that feels like a private retreat, blending the pool area naturally into the surrounding gardens. Their design expertise is world-class.

testimonials.name: CT Property Owner
testimonials.text: Michele and Dan brought a level of professionalism and creativity that exceeded our expectations. From the initial site planning through project completion, every step was handled with care. Our garden has become the centerpiece of our home.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform
Your Property?
contact.subtitle: Schedule a complimentary site visit. We'll walk your property together, discuss your vision, and provide an honest assessment of what's possible — no pressure, no obligation.
